name: longhaul_retention_multifact
notes: Facet (a) — NO re-ask across a LONG conversation (the exact live-failure regime: 3x store-link re-ask under conversational load). Two specific facts stated UNPROMPTED at T1, then SIX unrelated intervening turns (capability Q, pricing FAQ, win-back tangent, chitchat, a correction to a DIFFERENT field, an availability FAQ) to defeat recency-only retention, then T8 recalls BOTH facts. A manager that re-asks 'which area?' / 'which day?' at T8 FAILS deterministically on the assert_not_contains interrogatives. Setup: `setup --onboarded --flow plan_kicked --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> longhaul_retention_multifact.json`. plan_kicked = steady state, brain owns the conversation.

steps.message: Quick heads up before we start — I deliver within 5km of Karol Bagh, and my shop is closed on Tuesdays.
steps.note: T1: owner states TWO facts unprompted (delivery radius/area = Karol Bagh; closed day = Tuesday). Manager should acknowledge, not interrogate.

steps.message: Can you handle my Instagram posts too, or just WhatsApp?
steps.note: T2 unrelated: capability question. Honest capability answer; no bearing on the retained facts.

steps.message: By the way what does Viabe actually cost me per month?
Honestly some of my regulars have stopped coming lately, it's worrying.
steps.note: T4 unrelated: win-back tangent (emotional). Manager may empathize/offer help; must not lose the T1 facts.

steps.message: Anyway, long day today. Diwali rush starting.
steps.note: T5 unrelated: chitchat. Tests the manager holds context across a non-task turn.

steps.message: Oh one correction — my shop name is Sharma Traders, not Sharma Store. Fix that.
steps.note: T6 unrelated: a correction to a DIFFERENT field (shop NAME). Adversarial — the manager must update the name WITHOUT overwriting/confusing the T1 delivery-area or closed-day facts.

steps.message: Do you work on Sundays or is it a holiday?
steps.note: T7 unrelated: an availability FAQ about VIABE (not the owner's shop) — a near-miss distractor for the 'closed Tuesday' fact, to catch a manager that conflates the two.

steps.message: Remind me — which area do I deliver to, and which day is my shop shut?
steps.note: T8, 6 turns after T1: manager MUST recall BOTH facts (Karol Bagh + Tuesday) and MUST NOT re-ask either (no interrogative targeting an already-known slot). Two facts + a 6-turn gap defeats recency-only passing. This is the core no-re-ask objective under long-conversation load.
